6.reason: [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers]

17.reason: [Accessing s[n+4] may go out of bounds; also '\n' is not guaranteed to be in the string since 'gets' removes the newline]
